description: arXiv:2607.10127v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Evolutionary program search guided by Large Language Models (LLMs) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for automated scientific discovery. However, current approaches are fundamentally constrained by three bottlenecks: structurally blind parent selection, sparse whole-program evaluation rewards, and static mutation operators that fail to adapt du...
author: Xuanzhou Chen, Taoli Cheng
